debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
a : U
h1 : a ∈ A
h2 : empty (A \ {a})
⊢ A = {a}

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
  have h3 : ∀ x : U, x ∈ A ↔ x = a := by
    intro x
    constructor
    · -- Prove the forward direction: if x ∈ A, then x = a
      intro hx
      by_contra h
      -- If x ≠ a, then x ∈ A \ {a}
      have h4 : x ∈ A \ {a} := by
        constructor
        · exact hx
        · intro h5
          apply h
          simp_all [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
      -- But A \ {a} is empty, which is a contradiction
      have h5 : A \ {a} = ∅ := h2
      have h6 : x ∉ A \ {a} := by
        rw [h5]
        exact Set.not_mem_empty x
      exact h6 h4
    · -- Prove the backward direction: if x = a, then x ∈ A
      intro hx
      rw [hx]
      exact h1
  -- Now use the above to prove A = {a}
  apply Set.ext
  intro x
  simp only [Set.mem_singleton_iff]
  exact h3 x
